Employment

Join Evergreen Catholic Schools!

Discover a fulfilling career where faith, community, and professional growth come together. Here's why you should choose Evergreen:

Faith-Centered Community
Holistic Student Development
Collaborative Culture
Professional Growth
Meaningful, Mission-Driven Work
 

Explore our employment opportunities today and grow with us!

Virtual Open House

Join us for an informative virtual open house, where you can learn more about our division and the opportunities we offer!

Please click here for dates, times, and to register for our virtual open house events.

How to Apply

We prefer all applicants to create an online profile on Apply to Education. This will allow you to seamlessly attach your application to any open job opportunity. For substitute applicants, please download the Hiring Package from the Employment Documents section on this page.

Current Opportunities

Explore our current employment opportunities in the following categories:
Teacher Opportunities
Support Opportunities
Leadership Opportunities

All teaching and support staff employment opportunities can be viewed through the links provided above.  Job opportunities can also be found on Indeed or LinkedIn.

Contact Information
For more information, please contact our Division Office, Human Resources at 780-962-5627.
